memoryArtifacts.headline: John de Clinton was a knight
memoryArtifacts.description: Clinton was a knight who had served in the Scottish and French wars. He was summoned to Parliament as Lord Clinton in February 1299. Clinton was Knight of the Shire for Warwickshire between 1300 and 1 …

zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Clinton於大約1258年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾時，他的父親Thomas Clinton29歲，母親Maud Bracebridge25歲。他於1286年9月29日之後與Ida Odingsells在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1315年3月12日在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾馬可斯托可享年58歲，埋葬在英國瓦維其可爾可爾希爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Clinton于大约1258年出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾时，他的父亲Thomas Clinton29岁，母亲Maud Bracebridge25岁。他于1286年9月29日之后与Ida Odingsells在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1315年3月12日在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾馬可斯托可享年58岁，埋葬在英国瓦維其可爾可爾希爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clinton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Louth, Westmeath) and Scottish: shortened form of   McClinton  .

English: habitational name, either from Glympton in Oxfordshire, named as ‘settlement (Old English tūn) on the Glym river’, a Celtic river name meaning ‘bright stream’, or from Glinton in Northamptonshire, early recorded as Clinton (named with an unrecorded Old English element akin to Middle Low German glinde ‘enclosure, fence’ + Old English tūn). The surname was taken to Ireland in or before the 16th century.

History: Charles Clinton (born 1690 in Longford, Ireland) organized a group of colonists and founded the settlement of Little Britain, Ulster County, NY, in 1731. His son George Clinton (1739–1812) was governor of NY (1777–95), and they had many prominent descendants. — An English aristocratic family called Clinton was founded by Geoffrey de Clinton (flourished 1130), who held lands at Glympton, Oxfordshire. He was chamberlain and treasurer to Henry I (1100–35).

variants.name: McClinton
meanings: Irish (northern) and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gille Fhionntain (Scottish), Mac Giolla Fhionntáin (Irish) ‘son of the servant (i.e. devotee) of (Saint) Fionntan’, whose name has been explained as ‘the white ancient’.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Clinton was born about 1258, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Clinton, was 29 and his mother, Maud Bracebridge, was 25. He married Ida Odingsells after 29 September 1286, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 12 March 1315, in Maxstoke, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58, and was buried in Coleshill, Warwickshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Clinton est né environ 1258, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Clinton, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Maud Bracebridge, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Ida Odingsells après 29 septembre 1286, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 12 mars 1315, à Maxstoke, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Coleshill, Warwickshire, Angleterre.

September 1286 in England, United Kingdom Ida Odingsells geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 12. März 1315 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Maxstoke, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Coleshill, Warwickshire, England begraben.

Lui sposato Ida Odingsells dopo il 29 settembre 1286, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: John de Clintonが約1258年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Clintonは29歳，母Maud Bracebridgeは25歳であった。1286年9月29日以後にイギリスイギリスでIda Odingsellsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1315年3月12日にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアマクスストクで58歳で死去し，イギリスワーウィクシュアイアコーレシュイルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Clinton(이)가 대략 1258년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Clinton(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Bracebridge(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1286년 9월 29일 이후 영국 잉글랜드에서 Ida Odingsells(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1315년 3월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 맥스스토크에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워윅실르 콜레시에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Clinton nasceu aproximadamente 1258, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Clinton, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Maud Bracebridge, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Ida Odingsells após 29 de setembro de 1286, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de março de 1315, em Maxstoke, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Coleshill, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Clinton родился около 1258 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Clinton было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Bracebridge, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Ida Odingsells после 29 сентябрь 1286 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 12 марта 1315 г. в местности макссток, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности колешилл, варвиккшир, Англия.

Se casó con Ida Odingsells después de 29 de septiembre de 1286, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 12 de marzo de 1315, en Maxstoke, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Coleshill, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.
